name: Mustakim Shaikh
summary: Applied AI engineer with experience building practical LLM-powered systems and backend services. Skilled in Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), semantic search, and scalable AI APIs using Python. Passionate about developing reliable AI tools that help teams automate knowledge workflows and extract insights from large datasets.

experience.title: AI & Machine Learning Engineer
bullets: Built an LLM-based document intelligence system processing over 5,000 documents monthly, reducing manual analysis time by approximately 50%.
Developed Retrieval-Augmented Generation pipelines to improve knowledge retrieval across internal datasets.
Designed FastAPI-based AI services handling 300+ daily LLM queries with average response latency under 400ms.
Implemented local LLM inference using Ollama and llama.cpp, reducing external API usage costs by around 30%.

experience.title: Software & Data Engineer
bullets: Built analytics pipelines processing over 30,000 production records daily to monitor manufacturing performance.
Automated reporting workflows that reduced manual reporting effort by approximately 40%.
Developed dashboards that improved operational visibility and supported data-driven decisions.

experience.title: Associate Software Engineer
bullets: Developed backend APIs and automation modules for ERP and financial workflow systems.
Improved SQL query performance and reporting efficiency across internal applications.
Built internal tools to streamline data processing and reporting tasks.

projects.name: AI Knowledge Assistant
projects.description: Built a Retrieval-Augmented Generation system using LangChain and vector databases to enable semantic search across internal documentation and knowledge bases.

projects.name: Autonomous Research Agent
projects.description: Developed an AI agent that gathers information from multiple sources, summarizes key insights, and generates structured reports using LLM APIs.

education.institution: KCE's Institute of Management & Research, Jalgaon
